description.initial: The northern part of the island is as perfect as the rest: groomed paths through perfectly trimmed gardens, fruit trees bearing endless harvests, birds that sing the same song on endless repeat. The horror of this place grows clearer with every step. This isn't life. This is a beautiful death.
description.return: The northern island. Perfection continues its heavy hold.
description.atmospheric: The birdsong loops. The flowers don't wilt. The fruit is always ripe. Perfection is prison.

north.blockedMessage: The island ends here. You cannot swim away from paradise so easily.

items.itemMessage: A perfectly still pool beside the path. The water is clean and cold. It restores you, even if nothing else on this island feels real.

interactables.name: Fruit Tree
interactables.examineText: A tree bearing perfect fruit, every piece identical. When you pick one, another instantly appears in its place. The fruit has no taste.
interactables.interactionText: You bite into the fruit. It looks perfect, but there's no flavor. No sweetness, no tartness. Just texture without substance. Like everything here.
